title: Rally Coffee
description: Hip coffee shop with espresso drinks made from locally roasted beans & table rentals for meetings.

title: Herman's Coffee
description: Cafe & roaster in former auto repair shop serving coffee & espresso, pastries & espresso cocktails.

title: Chapterhouse Cafe & Gallery
description: This coffeehouse serves organic beverages & treats in a spare space lined with local artwork.

title: Habitat Coffee House
description: Cozy, colorful spot offering gourmet coffee made with house-roasted, sustainably sourced beans.

title: Menagerie Coffee
description: Artisanal java drinks & snacks in a brick-walled space with retro-style lighting & a homey vibe.

title: Elixr Coffee Roasters
description: Single-origin, hand-poured brews & espresso drinks offered up in an eco-friendly marble & wood cafe.

title: La Colombe Coffee Workshop
description: Trendy cafe serving house-brand artisanal coffee, pastries & snacks in a fashionable space.

title: Shot Tower Coffee
description: Industrial-chic cafe providing espresso drinks & tea, plus communal tables & some patio seating.

title: Old City Coffee
description: Small coffeehouse where the brews use beans roasted on-site & the food menu features light fare.

title: Nook Bakery & Coffee Bar
description: Housemade, small-batch baked goods & coffees plus light bites served in a cozy, vintage-style cafe.
